description: Dodge's 2013 Super Bowl ad, 'So God Made a Farmer,' repurposed a Paul Harvey speech. The high-minded, emotional tone surprised viewers and resulted in massive sentiment shift.

key_events.description: Super Bowl XLVII airs the spot; audiences are caught off guard by the non-commercial tone.
Social media conversation highlights the emotional resonance of the speech.
Brand favorability for Ram trucks spikes among rural and suburban demographics.
Industry analysts praise the ad as a departure from standard automotive tropes.

calibration_notes: Measures the impact of emotional, non-product-centric storytelling in marketing.
